situation: Was not automatically using workspace skills (webapp-testing for visual review, self-improving-agent after reviews). Only used global skills from system prompt.
root_cause: Treated available_skills list as exhaustive. Didn't build skill-routing habits.
solution: Added skill routing rules to AGENTS.md. Always match task to best available skill before starting.
lesson: Skills exist to be used automatically — don't wait to be told. Match task → skill → execute.

user_feedback.comments: remember this and use proper skills for different actions automatically
